text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While training with Rice Shower on the ramped
track...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We notice Mihono Bourbon silently running along
the same course.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her speed and strength are incredible, just like
when she's in a real race.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Warm-up complete. Checking vital signs... No
abnormalities detected.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
W-wow... She barely broke a sweat even after
running like that...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Rice Shower might be able to learn something
from Mihono Bourbon's running style.
choice_data_list:
How about we go ask about her training
regimen?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Huh? A-are we allowed to do that?
choice_data_list: Sure, think of it as another part of training.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: ...R-right. I do want to run like that, after all.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Rice Shower collects herself and goes to speak to
Mihono Bourbon.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Y-you were incredible back there... Do you
always run like that?

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
That was merely a warm-up. Today's primary
training begins now.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: A w-warm-up?! You were just getting started?!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Commencing weighted ramp training preparation.
Attaching weights to designated areas...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mihono Bourbon suddenly begins attaching
massive weight to her ankles!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
You're going to run the ramped track with
weights?! Aren't they heavy?

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: They are.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Y-yeah... I-I suppose that was obvious...

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
However, according to my calculations, this
amount of resistance is necessary for the most
effective training.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
If you would like, you may use the weights over
there.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Returning to primary objective. Confirming course
conditions... Conditions favorable. Commencing
final weight adjustments.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: She adds a few more weights before taking off.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: W-wow! She's going just as fast as before!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: O-okay... Maybe I should try it too.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: But it looks way too heavy...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: What should I do?
choice_data_list: Challenge yourself as best you can!

Why not just observe Mihono Bourbon some
more?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: What should I do?
choice_data_list: Challenge yourself as best you can!

Why not just observe Mihono Bourbon some
more?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Y-you're right! I'm going to challenge myself!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Maybe I'll just try one... to start.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: She tries to pick up one of the weights...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: I-it's heavier than I thought!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: B-but... I am challenging myself, after all!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She puts on the heaviest weights she can still run
with and takes on the ramped track.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It looks as exhausting as one would expect, but it
seems like her hard work is going to pay off.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Y-you're right. Maybe she has some kind of secret
technique.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Watch and learn... Watch and learn... I must
watch Mihono Bourbon and learn all that I can.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Stare...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She observes Mihono Bourbon's vigorous run
intently.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Aha! M-maybe...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It looks like she's learned something from
observing Mihono Bourbon's practice up close.
